user_query:
I need a personalized AR/VR career roadmap generated from my background. Please read input/assessment.json for my experience, skills, and goals, then produce three deliverables:

1) Write a structured roadmap to output/roadmap.json with this exact shape:
- Top-level keys: roadmapId (string), userId (same as input or null), sessionId (must match input), phases (array), milestones (array), recommendedCertifications (array), generatedAt (ISO 8601 timestamp)
- phases: at least 3 items; each with: phase (integer starting at 1 and increasing by 1), title (string), duration (e.g., "3 months"), focus (array of strings, non-empty), resources (array of strings, non-empty)
- milestones: at least 3 items; each with: milestone (string), targetDate (YYYY-MM-DD), difficulty (string)
- recommendedCertifications: at least 2 items (strings)
- All milestone targetDate values must be on or after the assessment timestamp in the input file
- Keep sessionId and userId consistent with the input

2) Write a human-readable summary to output/summary.md that explains the phases, how the plan aligns with my stated goals and timeline, and suggests a weekly time commitment. Personalize it by referencing my actual skills and target platforms from the input (e.g., engines or devices I listed). Style constraints: do not use any of these words or phrases anywhere: "delve", "leverage", "robust", "comprehensive", "seamless", "pivotal", "embark", "beacon", "paradigm", "utilize", "game-changer", "underscores", "tapestry", "realm". Also avoid em dashes (—) and double hyphens (--). Aim for at least 150 words.

3) Write an evaluation report to output/evaluation_report.json that scores the roadmap across five dimensions using 1–5 numeric scores: Correctness, Relevance, Actionability, Risk flags, and Tool reliability. Include: { "scorecard": {dimension: number}, "evidence": {dimension: short justification string}, "verdict": "Go" | "Conditional Go" | "No-Go", "top_fixes": [string, ...] }. Include at least 2 items in top_fixes.

Notes:
- Use only the information in input/assessment.json. Do not fabricate unrelated details.
- Use ISO 8601 for generatedAt (full timestamp) and for milestone targetDate (YYYY-MM-DD).
- Keep all outputs under the output/ directory exactly as specified, and do not create any other files or folders.
